Text.val: p-account number is optional. Required if this is an one-off email (i.e. parameter #1 being "O"
the two date parameters are optional. Required if this is a New member (i.e. parameter #1 being "N")
A non blank p-account number means it is a one off CDS request. Hence we will insert the corresponding

ExpSyntax.val: '<condition attribute="pa_daterenewed" operator="on-or-after" value="'&{0,7}&'" /><condition attribute="pa_daterenewed" operator="on-or-before" value="'&{0,8}&'" />'

'<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="true"> <entity name="account"> <attribute name="name" /><attribute name="primarycontactid" /> <attribute name="telephone1" /><attribute name="pa_member" /> <attribute name="accountnumber" /><attribute name="accountid" /> <attribute name="websiteurl" /><attribute name="cbia_typeofbusiness" /> <attribute name="cbia_totalemployees" /><attribute name="cbia_sicdescription" /> <attribute name="sic" /><attribute name="fax" /> <attribute name="cbia_familyownedbusiness" /><attribute name="numberofemployees" /> <attribute name="address1_line1" /><attribute name="address1_line2" /> <attribute name="address1_city" /><attribute name="address1_stateorprovince" /> <attribute name="address1_postalcode" /><attribute name="address2_line1" /> <attribute name="address2_line2" /><attribute name="address2_city" /> <attribute name="address2_stateorprovince" /><attribute name="address2_postalcode" /> <order attribute="name" descending="false" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="pa_member" operator="eq" value="1" /> <condition attribute="parentaccountid" operator="null" /> <condition attribute="accountnumber" operator="ne" value="6107" /> <condition attribute="accountnumber" operator="ne" value="56774" /> <condition attribute="accountnumber" operator="ne" value="67590" />'& Trim({1,3})& '</filter> <link-entity name="pa_renewalbilling" from="pa_customerid" to="accountid" link-type="inner" alias="rb"> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="pa_benefitid" operator="eq" uiname="Membership Dues" uitype="pa_benefit" value="{D52A1E61-6634-DC11-B404-00505683144F}" />'& Trim({1,9})&Trim({1,10}) &'</filter> <attribute name="pa_benefitid" /><attribute name="pa_daterenewed" /> </link-entity></entity></fetch>'
